content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 LooseGrip: Junior Designer (Part-Time Contract) Anywhere in the World New York Adobe Photoshop, Canva, Figma, and Social Media Content Design Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5802/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://Loosegrip.net">http://Loosegrip.net</a> </p> <h2>Bring the ideas. Polish the pixels. Make campaigns pop.</h2> <p>At LooseGrip, we're a boutique digital consultancy that transforms brands through data-inspired storytelling and performance marketing. We're looking for a&nbsp;<strong>Junior Designer</strong>&nbsp;to support our digital marketing campaigns-someone with a strong eye, a curious mind, and the hustle to turn briefs into beautifully executed visuals. This is a part-time contract role with flexible hours and real opportunities to grow alongside a tight-knit team.</p> <h2>What You'll Do</h2> <ul class="with-bullet"> <li><strong>Design for the scroll.</strong>&nbsp;Create on-brand social graphics, paid ad creative, email assets, and landing page visuals for a range of digital marketing campaigns.</li> <li><strong>Bring briefs to life.</strong>&nbsp;Translate creative direction and campaign goals into clean, compelling design that drives engagement and performance.</li> <li><strong>Stay on brand.</strong>&nbsp;Work within established brand systems, applying guidelines consistently across formats, channels, and clients.</li> <li><strong>Iterate fast.</strong>&nbsp;Take feedback in stride, refine quickly, and produce multiple variations to support A/B testing and campaign optimization.</li> <li><strong>Collaborate seamlessly.</strong>&nbsp;Partner with strategists, copywriters, and client experience managers to ensure every asset hits the mark.</li> </ul> <h2>What You Bring</h2> <ul class="with-bullet"> <li><strong>A solid portfolio.</strong>&nbsp;You have 1-3 years of design experience (internships and freelance count) with samples that show range across digital marketing formats.</li> <li><strong>Design tool fluency.</strong>&nbsp;You're at home in Figma and the Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign), including motion basics (After Effects, Premiere Pro). Bonus points for familiarity with email design tools.</li> <li><strong>AI curiosity and comfort.</strong>&nbsp;You're proficient in AI tools for ideation and efficiency (and know when to reach for them), but your instincts as a designer are always in the driver's seat.</li> <li><strong>A digital-first eye.</strong>&nbsp;You understand how design works in feeds, inboxes, and ad placements and you design with the end platform in mind.</li> <li><strong>Attention to detail.</strong>&nbsp;Typography, alignment, color, export specs-you sweat the small stuff because you know it adds up.</li> <li><strong>A self-starter mindset.</strong> You're a grown-ass adult who manages your time well, asks smart questions, moves work forward independently, and communicates well asynchronously and virtually with teammates through tools like ClickUp, Figma reviews, and Slack chats.</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/loosegrip-junior-designer-part-time-contract">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/loosegrip-junior-designer-part-time-contract</a></p> Tue, 14 Jul 2026 15:29:26 +0000 Thu, 13 Aug 2026 15:29:26 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/loosegrip-junior-designer-part-time-contract https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/loosegrip-junior-designer-part-time-contract Digital Treasury Pty Ltd: Senior SEO Specialist Anywhere in the World Australian Capital Territory Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5800/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Australia <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.digitaltreasury.com.au/">https://www.digitaltreasury.com.au/</a> </p> <h2>About the Role</h2> <p>As our Senior SEO Specialist, you'll own and grow SEO campaigns from strategy through to implementation. You'll work closely with our developers, writers, and account managers to improve organic visibility, strengthen authority, and build a predictable pipeline of qualified traffic for our clients</p> <p>This role is ideal for someone who is analytical, technically strong, proactive, and passionate about staying ahead of the dynamic AI &amp; search landscape.</p> <h2>Key Responsibilities</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Develop and own SEO strategy across multiple client accounts.</p> </li> <li> <p>Run comprehensive technical audits to identify crawlability, indexing, and site architecture gaps.</p> </li> <li> <p>Implement structured data, manage sitemaps and redirects, and troubleshoot rendering, canonicalisation, and crawl budget problems.</p> </li> <li> <p>Research keywords by intent and funnel stage, and work with the content team to close competitor and content gaps.</p> </li> <li> <p>Translate findings into actionable recommendations, roadmaps, content calendars, and sprint priorities for each client.</p> </li> <li> <p>Build authority through targeted link-building through outreach, guest posts, and partnerships.</p> </li> <li> <p>Optimise on-page SEO including metadata, internal linking, headings, and content structure.</p> </li> <li> <p>Analyse and optimise performance using GA4, GSC, Ahrefs, and similar tools, and manage reporting dashboards.</p> </li> <li> <p>Perform log file analysis where required.</p> </li> <li> <p>Work closely with developers to ensure technical recommendations are implemented correctly.</p> </li> <li> <p>Mentor junior SEO team members and provide technical guidance.</p> </li> <li> <p>Stay curious and keep up with algorithm changes, AI search trends, and SEO best practices.</p> </li> </ul> <h2>Skills &amp; Experience</h2> <h3>Required</h3> <ul> <li> <p>4+ years of SEO experience.</p> </li> <li> <p>Excellent understanding of Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience using tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, Sitebulb or similar.</p> </li> <li> <p>Solid understanding of web fundamentals (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and how they impact SEO.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with WordPress and other CMS platforms.</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable in managing multiple accounts across different industries in a fast-moving agency environment.</p> </li> <li> <p>Excellent written and verbal communication in English</p> </li> </ul> <h3>Bonus</h3> <ul> <li> <p>Hands-on experience
